metadata.description: Number of session hosts to deploy
Azure AD Tenant ID (for Azure Files Kerberos)
AVD Users group Object ID (for RBAC)
AVD Admins group Object ID (for elevated access)

properties.subnets: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', parameters('avdSubnetName'), 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', parameters('avdSubnetPrefix'), 'privateEndpointNetworkPolicies', 'Disabled', 'privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies', 'Enabled', 'serviceEndpoints', createArray(createObject('service', 'Microsoft.Storage'))))), if(parameters('enableBastionSubnet'), createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureBastionSubnet', 'properties', createObject('addressPrefix', parameters('bastionSubnetPrefix')))), createArray()))]

metadata.description: Friendly name for the host pool
Token expiration time in hours from now
Base time for token expiration calculation
Registration token - use listRegistrationTokens to retrieve
User group Object IDs to assign
Application group resource IDs to link
Delete local profile when VHD applies
Storage account key (only if not using Azure AD Kerberos)
Use storage key instead of Azure AD Kerberos

variables.officeCommands: [if(parameters('enableOfficeContainer'), createArray('$o=''HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\FSLogix\ODFC''', 'New-Item $o -Force | Out-Null', 'Set-ItemProperty $o Enabled 1 -Type DWord', format('Set-ItemProperty $o VHDLocations ''{0}'' -Type MultiString', variables('fslogixSharePath')), 'Set-ItemProperty $o SizeInMBs 30720 -Type DWord', 'Set-ItemProperty $o IsDynamic 1 -Type DWord', 'Set-ItemProperty $o VolumeType VHDX -Type String', 'Set-ItemProperty $o FlipFlopProfileDirectoryName 1 -Type DWord', 'Set-ItemProperty $o IncludeOfficeActivation 1 -Type DWord', 'Set-ItemProperty $o IncludeOneDrive 1 -Type DWord', 'Set-ItemProperty $o IncludeOutlook 1 -Type DWord', 'Set-ItemProperty $o IncludeTeams 1 -Type DWord'), createArray())]
variables.credCommands: [if(parameters('useStorageKey'), createArray(format('cmdkey /add:{0}.file.{1} /user:Azure\{2} /pass:{3}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('storageEndpointSuffix'), parameters('storageAccountName'), parameters('storageAccountKey'))), createArray())]
